category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ser2net as allowing connections between gensio accepters and connectors, generally network connections to serial ports.
source_facts.description says it allows network connections to serial ports.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is ser2net.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents building, usage, configuration, and connection examples.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository cminyard/ser2net is linked from the upstream README and matches the SourceForge release project.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents TCP serial connections and RFC 2217 support.
source_facts.description mentions network connections to serial ports.
